---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for UACC
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature? How would they use it?

## Additional Context

- Screenshots, mockups, or diagrams
- Links to related issues or discussions
- Examples from other tools that do something similar
